tools.name: crypto_prices
tools.description: Real-time USD spot prices for crypto assets. Accepts major symbols (BTC, ETH, SOL, USDC, USDT, DAI, BNB, XRP, ...), any CoinGecko id as "coingecko:<id>", or any token by "<chain>:<tokenAddress>". Aggregated feed with per-coin confidence score, ~15s freshness. Paid tool: $0.001 per call via x402 (USD

tools.name: gas_prices
tools.description: Live gas across chains (ethereum, base, arbitrum, optimism, polygon): current gas price, next-block base fee, slow/standard/fast priority-fee tiers straight from chain RPC, native token USD price, and the USD cost of a simple transfer so chains compare without unit math. Paid tool: $0.001 per call v

tools.name: defi_tvl
tools.description: Current total value locked (USD) for DeFi protocols by DefiLlama slug (e.g. uniswap, aave, lido). Paid tool: $0.001 per call via x402 (USDC on Base).

tools.name: polymarket_odds
tools.description: Live Polymarket prediction market odds. Search any topic free-text ("fed rate cut", "world cup winner") or fetch one market by its slug. Returns normalized markets: outcomes, prices, bid/ask spread, 24h volume, liquidity, resolution date, and the polymarket.com URL. ~15s freshness. Paid tool: $0.001

tools.name: polymarket_movers
tools.description: Polymarket prediction markets with the biggest odds swings in the last 24 hours, filtered to liquid markets (default $10k+ daily volume), most-moved first. The fastest way to spot where consensus is shifting. Paid tool: $0.001 per call via x402 (USDC on Base).

tools.name: polymarket_resolving
tools.description: Active Polymarket prediction markets resolving within the next N hours (default 24), sorted by 24h volume, with live prices. For tracking imminent event outcomes. Paid tool: $0.001 per call via x402 (USDC on Base).

tools.name: service_info
tools.description: Free. Service, pricing, and payment details for the chainpulse tools on this server.
